description.en: The character used to draw separator lines under the help-message headers. If empty, no ruler line is drawn. It defaults to '='.

excerpt.es: The character used to draw separator lines under the help-message headers. If empty, no ruler line is drawn. It defaults to '='.
excerpt.en: The character used to draw separator lines under the help-message headers. If empty, no ruler line is drawn. It defaults to '='.
